name: BestGofer Inc.
summary: PART I Overview BestGofer (or the Company) intends to focus on the delivery industry by providing consumers with the ability of having any desired retail item purchased on their behalf delivered directly to their door at any given time. On August 31, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of Liberty Home Inspection Services LLC (LHIS), a Washington-based provider of home inspection services, through the issuance of 20,000 shares of its common stock.
